scope: Canonical Region-to-Asset conversion with exact PNG crop and margin/gap provenance

repairs: Source Blob identity is verified against canonical blobKey, contentHash, byteSize and MIME before crop.
Post-put graph ownership is reconciled through descriptor-safe validated snapshots before storage action.
Destination metadata and Blob are preflighted; rejected put is reconciled even when post-write metadata becomes unavailable.
Conversion never removes storage; every attempt-created graph-absent failure emits exact cleanup debt.
Conversion and cleanup retry share a module-scoped queue keyed by assetId.
Only the conditional cleanup helper can remove, after two exact record fingerprint and Blob identity reads plus an immediate graph recheck.
Cleanup rechecks graph ownership after remove and restores the cached exact record plus Blob if exact ownership appeared during the awaited remove.
Returned AssetRecord requires exact own-data equality for all fields and provenance v2 geometry/source hash.
Browser failures expose bounded phase, reason and observed metrics without raw exception payloads.

transactionModel.projectGraph: Authoritative canonical asset.import; throw-after-commit resolves as success when exact graph ownership is observed.
transactionModel.binaryStorage: Content-addressed destination preflight plus createdByAttempt ownership state.
transactionModel.reason: AssetRepository and ProjectStore expose no shared or staged transaction seam.
transactionModel.keyedSerialization: Module-scoped per-assetId queue shared by conversion destination work and cleanup retry.
transactionModel.convertDeletePolicy: Conversion never calls remove; attempt-owned graph-absent failures always produce cleanup debt.
transactionModel.cleanupRule: The conditional helper alone may remove, after two exact full-record fingerprint and Blob identity reads and an immediate valid graph-absent recheck.
transactionModel.postRemoveRule: Recheck graph after awaited remove; exact ownership triggers restoration of the cached exact record and Blob, while unknown ownership restores then emits ownership debt.
transactionModel.uncertainRule: Unknown graph ownership preserves storage and emits redacted OWNERSHIP_UNCERTAIN recovery debt.
transactionModel.preexistingRule: Reused destination storage is never removed and never produces cleanup debt.
transactionModel.undoPolicy: Undo removes graph Asset but deliberately retains durable Blob for redo and reload.

coverage: strict source hash/key/size/MIME rejection before crop/write
successful import, provenance v2 reload, undo, redo and no-op retry
missing source and quota plus cancel/stale attempt-owned cleanup debt without inline deletion
put persist-then-throw with unavailable metadata produces exact cleanup debt without inline deletion
all AssetRecord fields plus source hash/bounds/gaps and hostile metadata results
null, forged, accessor and revoked dispatch results
throw, null, forged, accessor-project and revoked post-dispatch snapshots
undo then failed reconvert then redo/reload keeps preexisting Blob
metadata-missing destination Blob conflict without removal
cleanup debt created/absent/full-record fingerprint/Blob identity/graph gates, pre-remove graph recheck and idempotent retry
metadata unavailable during cleanup preserves storage with zero removes
same id/hash but changed record fingerprint after first read preserves storage with zero removes
graph ownership acquired during awaited remove restores the exact cached record and Blob
unknown graph ownership after remove restores exact storage and emits redacted ownership debt
concurrent cleanup retry and conversion for the same assetId are serialized with remove-before-put ordering

commands: git diff --check -- features/slice/assets tests/contract/regionToAsset.test.ts tests/browser/regionToAssetHarness.html tests/browser/regionToAssetJourney.ts tests/browser/regionToAssetBrowserRunner.mjs

visualReview.reason: Independent review accepted the pixel/alpha golden, visual crop, provenance display and zero-error browser evidence.

independentRecoveryReview.scope: Final external review accepted source identity/provenance, descriptor-safe post-put reconciliation, keyed serialization, conditional cleanup, graph-race restoration, undo/redo/reload and redacted browser diagnostics.
